---
name: New Model Profile
about: Add benchmark scores for a new model so GreenRouting can route to it
title: "[Model] "
labels: new-model
---

## Model Information

- **Model name**: (e.g. GPT-4.1)
- **Provider**: (e.g. OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Meta, Mistral)
- **API model ID**: (e.g. `gpt-4.1`, `claude-opus-4-20250514`)
- **Estimated parameters**: (e.g. 200B, unknown)
- **Pricing**: (input/output per 1K tokens)
- **Release date**:

## Benchmark Scores (0-1 scale)

Provide as many as you can. Sources appreciated.

- Reasoning (ARC/BBH/GPQA):
- Math (GSM8K/MATH):
- Code (HumanEval/MBPP):
- Knowledge (MMLU/TriviaQA):
- Creative (MT-Bench/AlpacaEval):
- Instruction (IFEval):
- Multilingual (MGSM/FLORES):

## Sources

Links to benchmarks, model cards, or leaderboards where you found these scores.

## Energy Estimate

If available, estimated energy per query in Watt-hours. Otherwise we'll estimate from parameter count.
